Turners Automotive Group Ltd ( (AU:TRA) ) has provided an announcement.

Turners Automotive Group Limited has announced its upcoming annual meeting of shareholders scheduled for 21 August 2025. data.title: AMTD Digital’s Subsidiary TGE Completes Merger with Black Spade II
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from AMTD Digital, Inc. Sponsored ADR ( (HKD) ).

On June 4, 2025, The Generation Essentials Group (TGE), established by AMTD Group, AMTD IDEA Group, and AMTD Digital Inc., completed a business combination with Black Spade Acquisition II Co. Following this merger, TGE’s Class A ordinary shares and warrants are set to begin trading on the New York Stock Exchange and NYSE American under the ticker symbols ‘TGE’ and ‘TGE WS’ on June 5, 2025. This strategic move positions TGE as a diversified global media, entertainment, and hospitality entity, integrating assets such as L’Officiel and The Art Newspaper. The merger is expected to enhance cross-collaboration opportunities and strengthen TGE’s market presence in the media and entertainment industry.

More about AMTD Digital, Inc. Sponsored ADR

AMTD Digital Inc., headquartered in France, operates as a comprehensive digital solutions platform. It focuses on digital media, content and marketing services, investments, as well as hospitality and VIP services. The company is part of the AMTD Group, which spans media, entertainment, education, and premium assets sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 480,798

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $509.9M

data.description:

Suzano Papel e Celulose SA ( (SUZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On May 26, 2025, Suzano S.A.’s Board of Directors held a meeting via videoconference, where they approved the delegation of authority to the company’s Executive Vice Presidency for contracting and renewing surety insurance in judicial and administrative proceedings. This decision allows the Executive Board to manage insurance contracts with premiums not exceeding R$ 20 million per insured object and an operation rate of up to 0.20% per annum. This move is expected to streamline operations and enhance financial management within the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (SUZ) stock is a Buy with a $17.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Suzano Papel e Celulose SA stock, see the SUZ Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SUZ is a Neutral.

The most significant factors impacting the overall score are the financial performance and technical analysis. Despite strong operational efficiency, Suzano faces challenges with profitability and high leverage. The technical analysis indicates bearish sentiment. Although the earnings call highlighted strategic focus and some positive developments, these are overshadowed by market uncertainties and cost challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on SUZ stock, click here.

Suzano S.A. is a leading company in the pulp and paper industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of paper and cellulose products. The company is based in Brazil and operates with a significant focus on sustainable practices and innovation within the global market.

Metro Performance Glass Ltd ( (AU:MPP) ) has shared an announcement.

Metro Performance Glass Ltd has responded to an application by Viridian NZ BidCo Limited for clearance to acquire Metro, expressing concerns over misleading statements regarding the glass industry and Metro’s position. The company maintains that engaging with Crescent Capital’s proposal is not in the best interest of its shareholders, emphasizing the positive outlook of its Australian operations.

Metro Performance Glass Ltd operates in the glass industry, providing glass products and services primarily in New Zealand and Australia. The company is known for its significant contributions through its Australian subsidiary, AGG.

data.title: Ridgetech Completes Capital Restructuring with Share Subdivision
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Ridgetech ( (RDGT) ) has shared an announcement.

On May 28, 2025, Ridgetech, Inc. completed a significant capital restructuring involving a capital reduction and share subdivision, following approval at its annual general meeting on February 25, 2025. The par value of each issued ordinary share was reduced from US$0.24 to US$0.001, and each authorized but unissued ordinary share was subdivided into 240 new shares. This restructuring, confirmed by the Grand Court of the Cayman Islands, resulted in an authorized share capital of US$36,010,000, divided into 36 billion ordinary shares and 10 million preferred shares, both with a par value of US$0.001 each. This move aims to enhance the company’s financial flexibility and market positioning.

Spark’s Take on RDGT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RDGT is a Underperform.

China Jo-Jo Drugstores is currently facing significant financial challenges, with negative profitability, high leverage, and declining cash flows being the primary concerns. Technical indicators also suggest a bearish outlook, with the stock trading below key moving averages. The valuation is unattractive due to negative earnings and the absence of a dividend. Overall, the stock is rated low, reflecting the need for strategic improvements to address financial instability and restore investor confidence.

To see Spark’s full report on RDGT stock, click here.

More about Ridgetech

Ridgetech, Inc., formerly known as China Jo-Jo Drugstores, Inc., is a Cayman Islands exempted company with its principal executive offices located in Hangzhou City, China. The company operates within the technology sector, focusing on providing innovative solutions and services.

Average Trading Volume: 84,653

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.02M
